message:
fix: review command followups — robust test lookups, wording, base branch detection

- Add FindByName helper; tests use name lookup instead of fragile index
- TestNames uses slices.Contains instead of positional assertions
- Fix 'supersedes' → 'takes priority over' for review_enabled var description
- Base branch fallback tries symbolic-ref before hardcoded 'main'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -141,7 +141,7 @@ description = "Review depth: quick, standard, or deep"
 default = "standard"
 
 [vars.review_enabled]
-description = "Enable /review code review gating for merges (true/false). Supersedes judgment_enabled when true."
+description = "Enable /review code review gating for merges (true/false). Takes priority over judgment_enabled when true."
 default = "false"
 
 [vars.review_blocking]

@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ DIFF=$(git diff; git diff --staged)
 DIFF=$(git diff --staged)
 
 # --branch: branch diff (detect base branch)
-BASE=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD@{upstream} 2>/dev/null | sed 's|origin/||' || echo "main")
+BASE=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD@{upstream} 2>/dev/null | sed 's|origin/||' || git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||' || echo "main")
 DIFF=$(git diff origin/$BASE...HEAD)
 
 # --pr <url>: PR diff
